headline: Discount grocery chain closing stores despite millions in public cash
summary: Despite receiving $13.5 million in city grant money to keep grocery stores open in underserved neighborhoods, a popular discount chain is preparing to close another six stores. The decision highlights a growing paradox across the industry: Even though inflation is driving more shoppers ...
